div1.entryFree: Semblable, resembling, similar, like, equal: it is a wonderful thing to see the s. coherence of his men's spirits and his, H4B V, 1, 72. his s., yea, himself, Timon disdains, Tim. IV, 3, 22. to make true diction of him, his s. is his mirror, Hml. V, 2, 124. that and thousands more of s. import, Ant. III, 4, 3.
